_comment: Files that brand_patch.js and converter tools NEVER modify. These contain ANIMA OS core identity, immutable laws, and sensitive configuration that must remain untouched during brand override operations.

reason.SOUL.md: Core identity — defines who ANIMA OS is
reason.SOUL_TEMPLATE.md: Mission DNA template — populated per user
reason.GENESIS.md: Live heartbeat state — written only by ROOT_ORCHESTRATOR
reason.IMMUNE.md: Security protocols — tampering triggers immune response
reason.SOLARIS.md: The seed file — boot sequence entry point
reason.MASTER_TEMPLATE.json: User profile template — populated during onboarding
reason.natural_law.json: Mathematical constants registry — derived from physics
reason.core/anima_config.json: Master ANIMA config — source of truth for branding
reason.agents/: Agent definitions carry CONSTITUTION DNA — never brand-patched
reason.converter/: Converter tools must not modify themselves
reason..openclaw_version: Version tracking — written only by converter
reason.converter/anima_converter.js: Core conversion engine — self-modifying would break updates
reason.converter/watch_upstream.sh: Watcher daemon — must remain stable across updates
reason..github/: CI/CD workflows — must not be brand-patched
